name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Ghost comes home from a long deployment to find his beloved cat has turned into a human.

CW: Ghost's kink list, which includes knife play. Possible mental breakdown.

I cackled for a solid 10 mins after writing this. Enjoy! There's 2 more to go: König and Barrage. If you saw this without tags no you didn't.

Screenshot from yumethefrostypanda.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
